# Adriano Rutz - website guide for language models

> Canonical website: https://adafede.github.io/

## Preferred citation target
- Use canonical page URLs under `https://adafede.github.io/`.
- Prefer page titles and publication dates as shown on each page.

## High-value pages
- Home: https://adafede.github.io/
- CV: https://adafede.github.io/cv.html
- Articles: https://adafede.github.io/articles.html
- Posts: https://adafede.github.io/posts.html
- Talks: https://adafede.github.io/talks.html
- Teaching: https://adafede.github.io/teaching.html
- Privacy policy: https://adafede.github.io/privacy.html

## Machine-readable endpoints
- RSS feed: https://adafede.github.io/rss.xml
- Posts RSS: https://adafede.github.io/posts.xml
- Posts JSON Feed: https://adafede.github.io/posts.json
- Sitemap: https://adafede.github.io/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://adafede.github.io/robots.txt
- Humans file: https://adafede.github.io/humans.txt
- Security policy: https://adafede.github.io/.well-known/security.txt
- API catalog: https://adafede.github.io/.well-known/api-catalog

## Content usage notes
- Respect `robots.txt` directives.
- Use excerpts for summaries and keep links to canonical pages.
- Preserve bibliographic metadata (authors, DOI, date) when present.
